summary: Created pgg-add proposal for dashboard reference theme reskin and commit subject format migration.
Created plan, task, five specs, and plan/task expert reviews for dashboard visual preservation, MUI chart adoption, version-dot commit contract, and QA audit gates.
Implemented dashboard reference theme reskin, MUI chart adoption, version-dot commit helper contract, generated docs/templates, tests, implementation diffs, and code review.

why: 대시보드 디자인을 add-img reference 톤으로 맞추고 pgg 커밋 제목 규격을 version-dot 형식으로 고정해야 합니다.

summary: Refactored InsightsRail rail panel and chart data helpers while preserving dashboard layout and MUI chart behavior.

why: 인사이트 레일의 반복 패널과 차트 데이터 변환을 작은 helper로 분리해 이후 시각화 유지보수를 쉽게 해야 합니다.

summary: Measured workflow/helper/template and handoff token contributors; pgg-state-pack output reduces naive full-doc handoff by about 88.3%.
Measured dashboard production build time, asset sizes, chart layout stability, and manual browser latency deferrals; large single JS chunk remains the main residual risk.
Verified dashboard build, core tests, workspace build, required audits, commit contract regression, and QA gate; archive is allowed with residual JS chunk and manual browser verification risks.

why: QA 산출물과 최종 검증 변경은 archive publish 전에 별도 완료 commit으로 남아야 한다.
